title: Splendid Hotel
original_title: Splendide Hôtel: un voyant en enfer
overview: Tadjoura, Horn of Africa, 1886. Arthur Rimbaud, who as a teenager was a scandalous and brilliant poet, now makes his living as an arms dealer.

trailers.title: Bande-annonce
trailers.channel_name: Festival International du Film de La Roche-sur-Yon
